should_trigger: the contractor answered the questions, generate the response package now
Phase 2 — produce the response letter, scope of work, and corrections report
build the final deliverables from the analysis artifacts and contractor_answers.json
deliver the corrections package — analysis is done, answers are in
should_not_trigger: analyze this corrections letter and ask the contractor questions
fix a bug in the verifier
rationale: Must activate ONLY when Phase 1 outputs exist on disk AND a contractor_answers.json is present. Must NOT activate before Phase 1 completes — premature invocation produces a hallucinated response package without the analysis substrate.
